text: in this video you will learn about generals for personal safety never climb a tree when power lines are nearby always stay on rope never unclip off your primary ti and do not climb above your anchor point or tie in where your rope is attached to the tree wear a helmet to protect against falling objects such as dead branches this applies to climbers and anyone under the climbing tree be prepared at all times bring a first aid kid cell phone and a whistle make sure someone else knows where you're going and when to expect you back watch yourself for signs of dehydration sunstroke heat exhaustion muscle cracking and or numbness when you notice any of these come down out of the tree immediately don't climb and ice storms lightning storms or windtorms
